calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-23-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Aug-07-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Dave Davenport.
Douglas Holloway, Esq. for Plaintiff: Bank of the West.
Order waiving live testimony is in file.
After hearing the evidence presented and considering of the Declaration by Ernest Knowles, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Co-Defendants: Profile Auto Body & Glass, Inc. and James D. Seeger as follows:
Principal $24,004.16
Prejudgment Interest $1,557.44
Attorney's Fees $2,500.00
Costs $535.00, for a total of $28,596.60
Plaintiff is entitled to the immediate possession of the leased equipments listed in "Exhibit 1" attached to the Judgment, see scanned doc. for details.
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-06-2007 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jun-10-08 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar May-03-2007 Off Calendar
